summary: Iteration 96: SmartDock minimize, drag, and persistence features - All 12 test cases passed. Frontend-only testing completed successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartDock minimize/drag/persist features fully tested. Key data-testids: smart-dock, dock-drag-handle, dock-minimize, dock-restore, dock-expand, dock-collapse, dock-assistant, dock-mixer, dock-frequency. localStorage keys: cosmic_dock_position (JSON {x,y}), cosmic_dock_minimized ('true'/'false'). Dock hidden on /auth, /tutorial, /live/* routes. Border-radius changes from '14px 0 0 14px' (right edge) to '14px' (custom position).

dock_renders_with_all_elements.details: SmartDock renders on right side by default with drag handle, icons (Sage, Mixer, Tones), expand/collapse, and minimize button.

minimize_to_sparkle_dot.details: Clicking minimize button hides dock to a small sparkle dot with data-testid='dock-restore'.

restore_from_minimized.details: Clicking the minimized sparkle dot restores the full dock with all controls.

minimize_state_persists.details: Minimize state persists in localStorage (cosmic_dock_minimized) and survives page reload.

drag_handle_repositioning.details: Drag handle allows repositioning dock anywhere on screen. Tested drag from x=1867 to x=473.

position_persists_in_localstorage.details: Dragged position persists in localStorage (cosmic_dock_position as JSON {x,y}) and survives page reload.

panels_work_after_drag.details: Sage (assistant), Tones (frequency), and Mixer panels all open correctly after dock is dragged to new position.

dock_hidden_on_auth.details: Dock is hidden on /auth route as expected.

dock_hidden_on_tutorial.details: Dock is hidden on /tutorial route as expected.

expand_collapse_functionality.details: Expand button shows additional dock items, collapse button hides them.

default_position_right_side.details: When no saved position exists, dock defaults to right side (x=1867, vertically centered).

border_radius_adjustment.details: Code review confirms border-radius changes from '14px 0 0 14px' when on right edge to '14px' when moved to custom position (line 219 in SmartDock.js).
